title: P: Gap Detection Subsystem
purpose: Detect substantive spectral and regulatory gaps between meeting transcripts, slide analysis, and prior working paper drafts.
golden_path_role: Identifies missing evidence before a working paper draft is written, preventing decorative gap analysis and ensuring downstream traceability.
invariants: Gap detection must reference at least one source transcript or slide signals document.
Every identified gap must include a traceability link to its originating evidence.
Readiness scorer must emit a numeric score between 0.0 and 1.0.
Patch generator must not silently discard gaps with empty evidence arrays.
known_edge_cases: Transcript with no action items produces an empty gap list (valid but must not crash).
Slide signals with only decorative titles yield zero substantive gaps.
Conflicting evidence from two slides must surface as an explicit conflict gap, not silently merged.
